import { tw } from "~/tw";

function Skeleton({
  className,
  ...props
}: React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement>) {
  return (
    <div
      className={tw.def([className], {
              animation: "animate-pulse",
              borderRadius: "rounded-md",
              backgroundColor: "bg-primary/10",
          })}
      {...props}
    />
  )
}

export { Skeleton }
